calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Trutner, via zoom, for Constance McCarthy, Executor.

The court points to the apparent lack of notice issue to the CA Franchise Tax Board ("FTB") and counsel confirms that it does appear that the FTB was not notified regarding this matter. Counsel provides additional testimony. The court reminds counsel that her client would be responsible for any loss of estate assets that are not FDIC insured. Counsel confirms with the court that she has advised her client regarding the FDIC limits.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To Mar-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Continued To Feb-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Trutner, via ZOOM, for Constance E. McCarthy, Petitioner.

The court confirms that no appearances are being made to object to this petition. The court then confirms that publication in this matter is being waived.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 6, 198 was admitted to probate on February 6, 2002. Constance E. McCarthy is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 27, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Granted Per Written Order
